title: EIP7702 relay proxy fallback with admin workflow, EOA delegatecall forwarding, and transient init request
trigger_patterns: ERC1967 proxy with admin and EOA workflows
explanation: Single fallback handles four execution modes: (1) calls to the proxy contract itself for implementation()/admin()/upgrade()/changeAdmin (distinguished by address() == __self), with selector dispatch via shr(224, calldataload(0)); (2) zero-arg read of implementation from the EOA side returning the cached or default impl; (3) standard delegatecall forwarding from the EOA to the impl, bubbling up returndata for both success and revert; (4) initialization workflow when no impl is set yet, fetching the default from the proxy via staticcall AND running delegatecall in the same and() expression — Yul's right-to-left evaluation means staticcall runs first and writes the impl address to memory, then delegatecall reads it via mload(calldatasize()). Transient storage signals from the delegation cause sstore to bake the impl into ERC1967 storage. Preserves upper 96 bits of the impl slot for future use.
when_to_apply: EIP7702 EOAs that delegate to a relay proxy for upgradeability without re-signing the 7702 authorization on each upgrade
when_not_to_apply: Pre-Cancun chains (no transient storage), simple non-upgradeable EIP7702 delegations
